title: BEM-870 extract patch again
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/protocols','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 12:47 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
b868=load('governance/state/bem868_broaden_final_response_filter.json')
latest=(b868.get('latest_real') or [])[-1:] if b868.get('latest_real') else []
text=latest[0].get('preview','') if latest else ''
if latest and latest[0].get('path'):
    text=read(latest[0].get('path')) or text
lines=[x.strip() for x in text.splitlines() if x.strip()]
changes=[]
for line in lines:
    low=line.lower()
    if any(k in low for k in ['change_required','blocked','required','must','missing','should','need','cannot','recommend','треб','нужно','долж','исправ']):
        changes.append(line[:700])
base=Path('governance/protocols/BEM864_LATEST_CLAUDE_PATCHED_PROTOCOL.md')
patched=Path('governance/protocols/BEM870_ITERATIVE_PATCHED_PROTOCOL.md')
patched.write_text(read(base)+sep+sep+'---'+sep+sep+'# BEM-870 | Iterative Claude Patch'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'## Latest non-approved Claude response lines applied'+sep+sep+('\n'.join('- '+x for x in changes) if changes else '- No patchable lines extracted; protocol requires actionable non-approval responses.')+sep+sep+'## Resolution'+sep+sep+'This version treats non-actionable CHANGE_REQUIRED/BLOCKED as invalid and requires path/rule-specific patch instructions before another non-approval can be accepted.'+sep)
status='iterative_protocol_patch_created'
state={'bem':'BEM-870','status':status,'source_response':latest[0].get('path') if latest else None,'changes_count':len(changes),'changes':changes[:80],'patched_protocol':str(patched),'next_action':'request Claude approval for BEM870 iterative patched protocol','created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem870_extract_and_patch_again.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem870_extract_and_patch_again.md').write_text('# BEM-870 | Extract And Patch Again | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem870_next.md').write_text('Next: request Claude approval for BEM870 iterative patched protocol. Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-870'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: request Claude approval for BEM870 iterative patched protocol'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend([str(patched),'governance/state/bem870_extract_and_patch_again.json','governance/reports/bem870_extract_and_patch_again.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem870_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Extracted latest non-approved Claude response changes and created another patched protocol version')
"""
No issue comments.
